children.name: Stichodactyla haddoni
children.description: Stichodactyla haddoni, commonly known as Haddon's sea anemone, is a species of sea anemone belonging to the family Stichodactylidae.

children.name: Stichodactyla helianthus
children.description: Stichodactyla helianthus, commonly known as the sea sunflower or sun anemone, is a sea anemone of the family Stichodactylidae.

children.name: Stichodactyla mertensii Brandt, 1835
children.description: Stichodactyla mertensii Brandt, 1835 — a anthozoa species in the genus Stichodactyla.
